exploration_notes: Wrote 12 integration tests covering: boolean evaluation (default/threshold match), variant evaluation (disabled flag/rule match with attachment), flag-not-found 404s on both endpoints, malformed JSON 400s, namespace scoping, batch evaluation (mixed boolean+variant+error), empty batch, and wrong flag type. Tests spin up a real gRPC server with the evaluation service and a gRPC-gateway HTTP frontend, using mock stores to control flag/rule/rollout/distribution data.
